infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Prioritize uses your camera so you can take a profile photo or attach an image to a task, such as adding a photo to a to-do item.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Prioritize accesses your photo library so you can choose a profile picture or attach an existing image to a task, such as selecting a saved photo for a to-do item.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Prioritize uses your microphone so you can describe tasks with your voice.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Prioritize uses Calendar access to sync your due-date tasks to your Apple Calendar and keep those events updated.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: Prioritize sends reminders for upcoming and overdue tasks, plus optional daily summaries, so you can stay on track.
